title: Tetrion Powder All Purpose Filler 5Kg
features: Tetrion All Purpose Filler is the same tried and trusted formulation which has been the "go to" for trade decorators and DIY enthusiasts for years.
Very tough and versatile, it can be used for either interior or exterior jobs on plaster, wood, stone, brickwork and more.
Long lasting repairs, resistant to vibration, shrinking, sagging and cracking.
Easy to shape and sand, very smooth finish and over-paintable after 24 hours.
Strong reliable formulation which is shapeable, drillable, spreadable, paintable, pluggable, and sandable.
description: Product Description The Tetrion brand is one of the most recognisable names within the professional trade market over the last 40+ years. At its launch in the early 1970’s Tetrion changed the filler market with the innovation of the first ‘All Purpose Filler’. With Fillers, Adhesives, Decorating Sundries, and much more, Tetrion covers every aspect of modern household decorating, attracting new tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts with its reputation as one of, if not the best homecare range on the market. Tetrion All Purpose Filler (Powder) 5Kg Tetrion All Purpose Filler is the same tried and trusted formulation which has been the "go to" for trade decorators and DIY enthusiasts for years. The Original All Purpose Filler for use inside and out, suitable for most household material including plaster, wood, stone, and brickwork. Specially designed to give a super smooth, polymer re-enforced, permanent finish Consistent 2 hour setting time, rapid sanding to feather edge Over-paintable after 24 hours Non-sagging formula Will not clog abrasive paper Super smooth and easy to shape Great for thin skims or deep fill Can be drilled, nailed or screwed Developed to be tough and highly versatile, it can be used for either interior or exterior jobs on most household materials including plaster, wood, stone and brickwork Vibration and shrink resistant, non-sagging formula Very smooth finish, easy to shape and sand, over-paintable after 24 hours High strength formula, can be drilled, sanded, shaped, painted and plugged Directions for use: Ensure all surfaces are clean, dry and free from loose material Remove all decayed wood down to a dry, sound material. Allow damp wood to dry thoroughly before applying filler Prime any metals (e.g. screwheads) with a metal paint primer before filling to avoid rust Add 2 to 2.5 parts Tetrion All Purpose Filler to 1 part water. Mix thoroughly to form a smooth paste, adding more water or powder as necessary. paste remains workable for up to 1 hour. Do not use excessive water when mixing. use a stiffer mix with less water for wood, large repairs or vertical surfaces Apply with a knife and fill to a level just above that of the surrounding surface. Smooth off with a wet blade. Setting occurs in a bout 2 hours depending on atmospheric conditions. hardened filler can be sanded to form a smooth finish. When carrying out deeper repairs (greater than 10mm) fill in layers, smooth the final layer with a wetted knife After use, fold over sachet in carton to prevent moisture attacking the powder. Store in dry conditions and protect from frost Advice: Tetrion All Purpose Filler should be applied in layers of no less than 3mm and no greater than 10mm to ensure satisfactory performance. Do not use in wet or damp conditions. Where rain, moisture or condensation is expected, cover the surface with a waterproof material until the filler is hard. When filling deep holes or cracks, leave for 24 hours before overpainting. Do not add previously mixed filler to a freshly prepared mix. Do not return mixed filler to the original sachet. Do not use in temperatures below 5°C. Overpaint with an oil-based paint when using externally. Prime with a suitable sealer when overpainting with a water-based paint. Do not use on surfaces regularly underwater and do not sandwich between layers of paint. Use within 6 months of purchase.
